Motion To Amend Judgment And Of Non Appearance
Off Calendar Jan-21-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances.

RULING: There being no appearance, or objection, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s Motion To Amend Judgment And Of Non Appearance is Granted. No opposition filed.

Order and Judgment were signed after hearing.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
